prompt: I'm at Maker Nexus and I want to dial in feeds and speeds for the CNC on a new bit-and-material combo I haven't run before — 1/8-inch single-flute upcut on 1/2-inch HDPE. I want to vary feed rate (40, 60, 80 IPM) and depth-per-pass (0.05, 0.1, 0.15 in) and measure edge finish quality (1-5 scale) and cycle time. Set up a DoE study for me — protocol YAML, blank data CSV, and tell me how I record results as I run them.

assertions.text: doe/study-01-protocol.yaml exists with the right factors and levels
doe/study-01-data.csv exists with 18 planned rows (3 x 3 x 2 replicates)
Protocol references both response variables (edge finish + cycle time)
Response references HDPE in materials and is consistent with Maker Nexus's wood-CNC banned_materials policy (HDPE is allowed per the seed profile)
